# robots.txt — Zhongyue Steel (ZY Steel) · https://www.zysteels.net
# Updated: 2026-07-20

# ── All crawlers: allow everything ──────────────────────────────
User-agent: *
Allow: /
Disallow: /node_modules/
Disallow: /dist/
Disallow: /.claude/
Disallow: /tests/
Disallow: /zhongyue-web/

# ── Google AdsBot (respects crawl rules for ad quality) ────────
User-agent: AdsBot-Google
Allow: /
Disallow: /node_modules/
Disallow: /dist/

# ── Facebook crawler — allow full access for OG previews ───────
User-agent: facebookexternalhit
Allow: /

# ── Bing / Microsoft bot ────────────────────────────────────────
User-agent: Bingbot
Allow: /

# ── Twitter card preview bot ────────────────────────────────────
User-agent: Twitterbot
Allow: /

# ── WhatsApp preview bot ─────────────────────────────────────────
User-agent: WhatsApp
Allow: /

# ── Sitemap declaration ─────────────────────────────────────────
Sitemap: https://www.zysteels.net/sitemap.xml
